name: Cap Rate Calculator
seo_description: Calculate capitalization rate. Free, fast and no sign-up required.
result_context: The cap_rate of {cap_rate}% indicat is the property's unleveraged return based on current income.
mistakes: Using gross income instead of net operating income (NOI)
Not properly calculating NOI by subtracting all operating expenses
Comparing cap rat is across different property typ is without adjustment
desc: Free online cap rate calculator. Enter annual noi and property value to get instant results.
